hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(rm|rmdir|unlink|shred|trash)'; then outside=$(echo "$cmd" | grep -vE '/Users/shohelshamim/AppDev/Shohel-App/microservices-go'); if [ -n "$outside" ]; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Blocked: remove/delete commands outside the project directory are not allowed."}'; exit 0; fi; fi; echo '{"continue": true}'
